'''√ch-p-j''' ('''kachapaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deathmatch|deathmatch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deathmatch|deathmatch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ch-p-j
|-
! Lemma
| kachapaj
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thichapaj || jichapaj || shichapaj || kichapaj
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuchapaj || jujuchapaj || shushuchapaj || kukuchapaj
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuchapaj || juchapaj || shuchapaj || kuchapaj
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuchapaj || juchapaj || shuchapaj || kuchapaj
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thechapaj || jechapaj || shechapaj || kechapaj
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothochapaj || jojochapaj || shoshochapaj || kokochapaj
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thochapaj || jochapaj || shochapaj || kochapaj
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thochapaj || jochapaj || shochapaj || kochapaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || chapaj || chapaj || chapaj || chapaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || chapaj || chapaj || chapaj || chapaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || chapaj || chapaj || chapaj || chapaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || chapaj || chapaj || chapaj || chapaj
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæchapaj || jæchapaj || shæchapaj || kæchapaj
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathachapaj || jajachapaj || shashachapaj || kakachapaj
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thachapaj || jachapaj || shachapaj || kachapaj
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thachapaj || jachapaj || shachapaj || kachapaj
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shachapaj
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshachapaj
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishachapaj
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shachapajnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshachapajnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishachapajnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shachapajshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshachapajnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishachapajshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shachapajro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshachapajnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishachapajro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shachapajmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshachapajnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishachapajmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shachapajsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshachapajnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishachapajsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shachapajng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshachapajnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishachapajng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shachapajya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshachapajnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishachapajya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shachapajyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshachapajnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishachapajyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shachapajnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshachapajnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishachapajnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shachapajnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachapajnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachapajnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shachapajnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshachapajnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachapajnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shachapajshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshachapajnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishachapajshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shachapajshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachapajnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachapajshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shachapajshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshachapajnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachapajshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shachapajronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshachapajnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishachapajronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shachapajroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshachapajnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishachapajroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shachapajromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshachapajnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachapajromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shachapajmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshachapajnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishachapajmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shachapajmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshachapajnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishachapajmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shachapajmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachapajnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachapajmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
